name: graph-lift sweep — diff2test cross-repo — lora graph-aug (h2)
hypothesis: Is the training-free graph lift a tuned knife-edge or a plateau across (alpha, hops), and can multi-hop rescue diff->affected-test or is it structure-bound?
leakage_checks: test-file features come ONLY from PRs that modify them (structure).
gold (PR,test) modifies edges excluded from aggregation (no leakage).
known_limitations: STRUCTURE-BOUND: 75/160 (47%) gold tests isolated after the leakage guard; reachable ceiling 60%. Flat across all (alpha,hops) — needs denser co-change (scale), not tuning.
pilot scale; TRAINING-FREE mean aggregation (no learned weights); single cross-repo split; exploratory sweep, not release evidence.
